mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification (user_id, type, message, target_type, target_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{type}, #{message}, #{targetType}, #{targetId})
mapper.select: SELECT notification_id AS notificationId, user_id AS userId, type, message, target_type AS targetType, target_id AS targetId, is_read AS isRead, created_at AS createdAt FROM notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT notification_id AS notificationId, user_id AS userId, type, message, target_type AS targetType, target_id AS targetId, is_read AS isRead, created_at AS createdAt FROM notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = FALSE
